/plan "if we are running a 3x3 grid, 9 geopoints, and some fail, we need to identify why it failed to see if it is a recoverable error or not. A recoverable error would be a captcha which we could solve with a 3rd party service or a timeout which means we could simply retry with exponential backoff. We need to implement integration with a captcha sovlving service that we can use to recover from an error, and as a backup for non-recoverable errors, call the google places api."
